sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_bit_operations (id UInt32, value_a UInt32, value_b UInt32, result UInt32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_bit_operations (id, value_a, value_b) VALUES (1, 6, 3), (2, 5, 1), (3, 7, 2);
UPDATE test_bit_operations SET result = bitAnd(value_a, value_b) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, value_a, value_b, result FROM test_bit_operations WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, bitAnd(value_a, value_b) AS bitwise_result FROM test_bit_operations WHERE value_a > 4;
